title: Triage-time admission prediction in adults with suspected acute gastrointestinal infection
description: Reproducible analysis code for a triage-time clinical prediction model of hospital admission among adults with suspected acute gastrointestinal infection (development in MIMIC-IV-ED; external validation in NHAMCS ED 2016–2022). Restricted datasets are not redistributed.

creators.name: Zheng, Hongwei
